description_long: This object is a simple, upright gravestone or headstone, typically found in graveyards or cemeteries. It features a rounded top and a rectangular base, with a smooth, unadorned surface that appears to be made of light gray marble or stone. The surface is mostly plain, with subtle marbling and no visible inscriptions or engravings. The sides are straight and the thickness is consistent, giving it a sturdy and solid appearance. The base is slightly wider than the upright portion, providing stability. There are no decorative elements, symbols, or additional features present on this gravestone.
description: A plain, upright gravestone with a rounded top and rectangular base, made of light gray stone with subtle marbling and no visible inscriptions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth, rounded top and wide, flat face of the gravestone.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and consistent thickness of the gravestone.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back surface and the rectangular base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and solid construction.
